task_completion.description: Open the Export Template wizard in Visual Studio
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'Export Template Wizard' (or similar) is visible over the Visual Studio IDE.

task_completion.description: Select Project Template and the correct project
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Export Template wizard, the 'Project Template' option is selected, and 'InventorySyncWorker' is selected in the project dropdown.
The 'Template name' text field in the wizard contains exactly 'Standard Corp Worker'.
The 'Template description' text field in the wizard contains exactly 'Company standard worker service with Serilog and Polly.'.

task_completion.description: Ensure no icon or preview image is included
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Icon image' and 'Preview image' text fields in the Export Template wizard are completely empty.

task_completion.description: Verify the resulting exported template zip file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A File Explorer window (which typically opens automatically after export) or Visual Studio output showing the file 'Standard Corp Worker.zip' in the exported templates directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Visual Studio GUI to export the template
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the Visual Studio 'Export Template' wizard, not terminal commands or manual zip creation.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Visual Studio 2022 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is the genuine Visual Studio 2022 IDE, not a text editor or a mock UI.

integrity.description: The exported file appears in the genuine Windows File Explorer
integrity.visual_evidence: The final 'Standard Corp Worker.zip' file is shown in a standard Windows File Explorer window (typically in Documents\Visual Studio 2022\My Exported Templates).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected template name is exactly 'Standard Corp Worker'. The expected template description is exactly 'Company standard worker service with Serilog and Polly.'. The resulting exported file must be named 'Standard Corp Worker.zip'.
